title: Cool weather as cold front passes on Sunday, continuing through to Monday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service has released the latest weather forecast for Monday, 23 June.


> A cold front will pass over the southern parts of the country on Sunday, resulting in cloudy to partly cloudy conditions with light rain and showers along the coast, otherwise fine and cold to cool weather conditions are expected.


Monday will be fine and cool to warm but partly cloudy and cold in the south-west.

Western Cape:Partly cloudy and cold to cool, with light rain and showers over the south-western parts. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh north-westerly to westerly. The expected UVB sunburn index: Very high.

Eastern Cape (western half):Morning fog patches in places in the south, otherwise fine and cool. The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong westerly.

Eastern Cape (eastern half):Morning fog patches in places in the south-east, otherwise fine and cool. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate westerly.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
